title: Jorin
content:

{{Quote|Seven, sir. Jorin's gone.|A Republic corporal reports Jorin's death to Sergeant Nidaljo|<ref name="Rescue" />}}
'''Jorin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] living on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and worked as a [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] with the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]]. During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], Jorin served under [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Nidaljo]] in the CSF's [[Special tactical unit|Special Tactical Unit]], a [[Special Weapons Team|tactical squad]] with the primary task of conducting operations against the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal syndicate. When the unit was tasked with aiding a [[Hero of Tython|Jedi Knight]] in rescuing the Republic [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Tarnis (Sith Lord)|Eli Tarnis]] from the syndicate, Jorin was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the unit's attempt to set up a perimeter around [[Black Sun Headquarters|Black Sun's headquarters]] in preparation for their upcoming [[Raid on the Black Sun headquarters|raid]].

==Biography==
{{Dialogue|Nidaljo|I'll go with you—but I won't ask my men to follow.|Corporal|You don't have to. The Jedi's right. We can't let those scum beat us.|Soldier|Count me in. Always wanted to fight alongside a Jedi.|attr=Nidaljo and his men agree to help after Jorin's death|src=<ref name="Rescue" />}}
Jorin was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] for the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]. Serving on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Jorin was part of the CSF's [[Special tactical unit|Special Tactical Unit]], a [[Special Weapons Team|tactical squad]] under the command of [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Nidaljo]] tasked with fighting back against the Coruscant-based [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal syndicate.<ref name="Rescue" /> By [[3643 BBY]],<ref name="SWTORdate" /> the team had been operating deep in the [[Black Sun territory|gang's territory]] for several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] when they were tasked with aiding a [[Hero of Tython|Jedi Knight]] in [[Raid on the Black Sun headquarters|rescuing]] the Republic [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Tarnis (Sith Lord)|Eli Tarnis]].<ref name="Rescue" />

{{GameLS}}
The unit was in the process of establishing a perimeter around Black Sun's [[Black Sun Headquarters|headquarters]] when the criminals attacked with high-grade weapons. Six members of the unit were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the attack, and Jorin was severely injured along with four others, forcing the unit to fall back behind a hastily-created barricade. Jorin succumbed to his injuries and died not long after the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] arrived, but the man's death helped the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] inspire Nidaljo and the rest of the unit to continue the fight and overwhelm Black Sun's forces.<ref name="Rescue" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
A Human male, Jorin had light skin and dark [[Color/Legends|brown]] hair.<ref name="Rescue" /> As the Coruscant Security Force had no formalized paramilitary training in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the Cold War, most [[Officer/Legends|officers]] were ill-trained to handle the street warfare that plagued Coruscant after the [[Sacking of Coruscant]] by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].<ref name="SWTORCSFcodex">{{TORcite|type=codex|Coruscant Security}}</ref> Jorin was one of several brave officers who joined the Special Tactical Unit to fight the Black Sun with more fire power than regular patrol officers had at their disposal. Though his commitment caused him to lose his life, Jorin served—in death—as a rallying point for his fellow cops.<ref name="Rescue" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jorin appears in the [[BioWare]] [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', in the Jedi Knight class story mission "Rescue." Jorin dies during the player character's conversation with Nidaljo, and the player can use Jorin's death to inspire the Sergeant and his men to join the fight against Black Sun as a [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] option. However, the player can also [[Mind trick/Legends|Force Persuade]] Nidaljo to help for [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] points, or leave the CSF team behind for no alignment points.<ref name="Rescue" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
